name: Jojoba Oil
description: A liquid wax ester (not a true oil) that closely mimics human sebum, offering exceptional oxidative stability and non-comedogenic skin compatibility.
chemicalName: Mixture of long-chain wax esters (primarily eicosenoyl eicosenoate)
appearance: Clear to golden yellow liquid at room temperature; odorless to very faint nutty odor
solubility: Insoluble in water; miscible with most oils and non-polar solvents
chemistry: Liquid wax ester closest to human sebum. Non-comedogenic. Balances oil production. Long shelf life.
